data.title: Classifier performance test flaky — 2s threshold too tight for single invocation
data.description: The test_classifier_performance test asserts the classifier completes in under 2s but it regularly takes 2-3s due to deps.sh sourcing and config resolution overhead. This causes intermittent failures that block commits. Threshold should be relaxed to 3s or the test should measure relative performance (not absolute wall clock).
